zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Stockport於大約1227年出生在英國爾時，她的父親Sir Robert de Stockport29歲，母親Roese de Venables14歲。她和Robert De Hyde of Norbury至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1264年在英國英格蘭爾諾波利 白 斯托普特享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Stockport于大约1227年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Stockport29岁，母亲Roese de Venables14岁。她和Robert De Hyde of Norbury至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1264年在英国英格兰爾諾波利 白 斯托普特享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stockport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stopford
meanings: English: locative name from Stockport (Cheshire), which is recorded as Stokeport in 1188, Stockford in 1283–8, Stopford in 1347, Stoppord in 1337, and Stapporte in 1583.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Stockport was born about 1227, in Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Robert de Stockport, was 29 and her mother, Roese de Venables, was 14. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Robert De Hyde of Norbury. She died in 1264, in Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Stockport est née environ 1227, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Stockport, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Roese de Venables, avait 14 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Robert De Hyde of Norbury. Elle est décédée en 1264, à Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.Norbury Hall, Stockport, Cheshire, Engla: Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Stockport um 1227 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Stockport 29 und ihre Mutter Roese de Venables 14. Sie hatte mit Robert De Hyde of Norbury mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1264 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Robert De Hyde of Norbury. Morì nel 1264, nel Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Stockportが約1227年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Stockportは29歳，母Roese de Venablesは14歳であった。彼女はRobert De Hyde of Norburyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1264年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリー ビー ストクプオルトで38歳で死去した。

ko.Norbury Hall, Stockport, Cheshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이 비 스톡포트
ko.lifeSummary: Margery Stockport(이)가 대략 1227년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Stockport(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Roese de Venables(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 Robert De Hyde of Norbury(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이 비 스톡포트에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Stockport nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Stockport, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Roese de Venables, tinha 14 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Robert De Hyde of Norbury. Ela faleceu em 1264, em Norbury by Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.Norbury Hall, Stockport, Cheshire, Engla: норбури би стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Stockport родилась около 1227 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Stockport было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Roese de Venables, 14. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Robert De Hyde of Norbury. Она умерла в 1264 г. в местности норбури би стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
